---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the test suite or harness is wrong.
title: "[bug] "
labels: [bug]
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the bug.

## Affected test id(s)

e.g. `30-remote-05`. Leave blank if the issue is in the harness/scoring/docs.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste the relevant line(s) from `results.json` if applicable.

## Environment

- OS:
- git version:
- gh version:
- python version:
- bash:

## Additional context

Anything else — logs, screenshots, related issues.
